extraction.one_line_summary: FUGLSANG counterattacked BENNETT on Madonna del Ghisallo descent with 15km remaining, grew gap to 31 seconds by finish.
tactical_patterns: FUGLSANG watched BENNETT monitor power data mid-climb before counterattacking, exploiting psychological moment when rival checked computer.
VLASOV sacrificed podium to chase for teammate FUGLSANG, holding back MOLLEMA/CICCONE group at 51 seconds behind lone leader.
Two-rider advantage in final selection proved decisive: domestique blocking work more valuable than extra firepower for chasing teams.
BENNETT attacked twice on Ghisallo ascent but Astana let gradient do selection work before counterattacking on descent.

rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: Confident sprint speed assessment allowed defensive riding until descent counterattack, superior race-reading intelligence.
rider_signals.BENNETT George: negative: Checked power data mid-attack revealing doubt, unable to respond when counterattacked despite strong climbing form from Tour.
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: Sacrificed personal podium to chase for leader, finishing 51sec back indicates complete tactical commitment over placement.
rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: neutral: Teammate presence in chase group behind podium suggests team strength but tactical coordination couldn't bridge to leaders.
